Class StatusController

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.controller.StatusController
@Controller @RequestMapping("/status") public class StatusController extends Object
REST controller for checking the status of the FHIR server connection.

This controller returns metadata about the configured FHIR server (e.g. version, name, availability) and exposes general configuration details relevant for the dashboard operation. Endpoint: GET /status
